description:
Add aot to # paths: in fixtures/{tail_recursion.fz, higher_order.fz, closure_typed_captures.fz, concurrency_ping_pong.fz}. Re-enable any AOT-specific expect_* checks that were dropped during the cps-in-clif cutover.

Also confirm src/ir_interp.rs handles the new IR shape correctly (it has been running these fixtures via the interp path through the cutover — likely no work needed).

Acceptance: cargo test --workspace runs each §8 fixture through jit / interp / aot with matching .expected output.
title: fz-cps.6.3: enable aot in §8 fixture paths + audit
